title: Master System Variations
description: A reference-dependent series that establishes one base visual language and then preserves it across material, ritual, and archive variations.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes the core symbol inventory, spacing rhythm, and material logic. Images 02-04 depend on it as --ref while changing surface, context, and presentation without losing the same design system.

en.title: Master System Variations
en.description: A reference-dependent series that establishes one base visual language and then preserves it across material, ritual, and archive variations.

zh-CN.title: 母版系统变体
zh-CN.description: 先建立一套基准视觉语言，再把它稳定延展到材质、仪式和档案变体中的参考依赖系列。

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.
